metricsData.reason: The score is 0.33 because the first two nodes in retrieval contexts are irrelevant nodes ranked above the relevant one: node 1 only says 'Shipping charges for Your Orders will be calculated and displayed at checkout,' and node 2 only provides 'All Orders are processed within 2-3 business days' and that orders are 'not shipped or delivered on weekends or holidays,' neither of which answers the question about shipping methods and delivery times. The relevant information appears only at node 3, where the retrieval contexts directly list 'Shipping method: FedEx Standard ... 3-5 business days' and 'Shipping method: FedEx Two Days ... 2 business days,' so the score is not higher because the useful node is ranked after two irrelevant nodes, but it is still 0.33 because one relevant node does appear in the ranking.
